publisher.name: RangeConverter
publisher.product: Free Poker Charts — 8 max 1bb ante MTT GTO Ranges
publisher.treeParams: 2.5x open, 3.5x 3bet IP, 4.5x 3bet OOP, 2.3x 4bet IP, 2.75x 4bet OOP, SB vs BB 3.2bb

solver.assumptions: Frequencies rounded to nearest 25% per source. ChipEV (non-ICM). 1bb (12.5%) big-blind ante. Adapted from 8-max UTG; weakest combos (54s, 65s, 76s, 87s, 98s, A2s, A3s, JTo, K7s, K8s, T9o) demoted to fold to reach the 9-max UTG VPIP band.
